name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetFallingReactionHelper.ReachLengthMultiplier
summary: Reach length multiplier that scales characters arm topological length, value in range from (0, 1 GT  where 1.0 means reach length is maximum.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 0.3f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
